ground_truth.title: Suit & Tux Shoe Rental - Rent Black & Brown Dress Shoes for Men | Generation Tux
ground_truth.main_content: Generation Tux's carefully curated collection of dress shoes, tuxedo shoes, and socks is designed to enhance your formalwear, ensuring your ensemble is flawless from head to toe. Our shoe rentals add the perfect finishing touch to your attire. The collection includes various filtering options for Category (Shoes, Socks), Pattern (Solid, Striped, Graphic, Floral, Dots, Argyle), Colors (Black, Grey, White, Tan, Orange, Red, Pink, Blue, Green, Brown), and Type (Rent, Buy). Products displayed include Black Dress Shoes ($30), Black Patent Leather Shoes ($30), Brown Leather Dress Shoes ($35), and various Stance socks in different colors ($14).
with: Generation Tux's carefully curated collection of dress shoes, tuxedo shoes, and socks is designed to enhance your formalwear, ensuring your ensemble is flawless from head to toe.
without: Social media buttons and sharing icons
